description: The Real-time Bidding API lets Authorized Buyers participants manage bidder and buyer account configuration for Google's RTB ecosystem, including endpoints, pretargeting, creatives, and related account resources. It is part of Google's Authorized Buyers tooling for programmatic advertising integrations.
summary: 1 HTTP API surface: the Google Real-time Bidding REST API at realtimebidding.googleapis.com, authenticated with Google OAuth 2.0 bearer tokens.
